channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Google Shrinks AI Memory With No Accuracy Loss—But There's a Catch
item.description: The technique reduces the memory required to run large language models as context windows grow, a key constraint on AI deployment.

item.title: Market structure bill compromise draws wide-ranging reaction from fractured crypto crowd
item.description: The yield agreement, seen as a step toward finally advancing the stalled market structure bill, hasn't yet fully won industry support.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: ZachXBT claims Circle wrongfully freezing exchange wallets
item.description: The stablecoin issuer was accused of freezing 16 hot wallets linked to operating businesses, including crypto exchanges and online casinos.

item.title: Google Sets 2029 Deadline to Deal With Quantum Threat—Is It a Problem for Bitcoin?
item.description: Google just issued a 2029 deadline to encrypt its systems against quantum computers. Bitcoin may not have the same luxury of time.

item.title: Data points to accelerating Ether supply crunch: Will ETH price follow?
item.description: The number of Ether staked continues to rise while ETH outflows from exchanges are increasing. Will the phenomenon have a positive or negative impact on ETH price?

item.title: US lawmakers hash out tokenized securities concerns in latest hearing
item.description: Industry executives told US lawmakers that existing investor protection and financial surveillance regulations should apply to tokenized securities.

item.title: Elon Musk's X hires crypto-savvy design lead as X Money payments push inches closer
item.description: Benji Taylor, former CPO at Aave Labs and design head at Coinbase's Base, brings self-custody wallet and DeFi product experience to the social media platform.

item.title: $15 Billion in Bitcoin Options Expire Friday as Trump's Iran Deadline Looms
item.description: Bitcoin options worth $15 billion expire Friday—just as a Trump-Iran diplomatic deadline runs out. Should traders expect greater volatility?

item.title: BitGo teams with ZKsync to build tokenized deposit infrastructure to bring banks onchain
item.description: Now in testing, the platform aims to enable programmable payments and simplify blockchain adoption for financial institutions.

item.title: Bitcoin ‘compression’ outcome may send BTC to $80K: Analyst
item.description: Bitcoin charts point to a possible rally to $80,000, but spot volumes need to increase in order for the rally to hold.

item.title: Franklin Templeton, Ondo to launch tokenized ETFs with 24/7 trading via crypto wallets
item.description: Available initially to non-US investors, the funds will offer onchain exposure to equities, bonds and gold through crypto wallets.

item.title: NEW: Swan Bitcoin files in SDNY to subpoena Cantor Fitzgerald and its former CEO, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, seeking discovery tied to a dispute with Tether over a joint mining venture. The filing alleges a mid-2024 internal conspiracy led by ex- - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE0yLThiNmZMVWVsTmUxclpvOTNXNElxYkdlRmgzS3lHclF5eE03UkxBZGJfTTJPc3hzaHUyd0tRX05wRmU5RFlmWVB4TE1mR2NNVjFORUFUdHBPLTRYZmw4Wm1pOE5sZw?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW: Swan Bitcoin files in S…

item.title: F1 Champion McLaren Racing Joins Hedera Council to Help Govern Network
item.description: Reigning Formula 1 champion McLaren will join Google, FedEx, IBM, and other firms in helping to guide Hedera’s growth.

item.title: Circle Selloff 'Looks Overdone' Analysts Say as Shares Rise After Cathie Wood Buys the Dip
item.description: Analysts argued that Circle's selloff was overblown after shares fell Tuesday amid crypto bill developments and a stablecoin rival's moves.

item.title: Price predictions 3/25: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, LINK
item.description: Bitcoin bulls are attempting to seize control of the market, but they are expected to face strong resistance in the $72,000 to $74,500 zone.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: Prediction Markets Don’t Just Forecast Power - They Reshape It
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Ryan Kirkley writes on how crypto prediction markets can risk incentivizing manipulation and amplify misinformation at scale.

item.title: AI agents to help investigators unearth crypto criminals, according to new TRM program
item.description: TRM Labs has added an AI agent to the services the blockchain analytics firm offers law enforcement agencies.

item.title: CoinShares Files for Bitcoin Volatility ETF Suite, Targeting BTC Price Swings
item.description: CoinShares filed for three Bitcoin volatility ETFs: a base, leveraged, and inverse fund. The funds could begin trading in early June 2026.

item.title: Franklin Templeton, Ondo Finance Bring 24/7 Tokenized ETF Trading to Crypto Users
item.description: Five Franklin Templeton ETFs will be tokenized via Ondo Finance as the firms seek to broaden access to traditional assets on-chain.

item.title: U.S. lawmakers dig into tokenizing securities as Trump ties muddy waters
item.description: A U.S. House of Representatives hearing reviewed tokenization, with a broad agreement that securities traded via token need the same treatment as regular trading.

item.title: Trump advisory council draws Coinbase co-founder, tech leaders
item.description: The council, co-chaired by White House AI and crypto czar David Sacks and science advisor Michael Kratsios, include Mark Zuckberg, Larry Ellison and Jensen Huang.

item.title: Bitmine launches institutional Ethereum staking platform
item.description: The MAVAN platform extends Bitmine’s staking operations to external clients as institutional demand for validator infrastructure accelerates.

item.title: Visa Becomes First Major Payments Company to Join Canton Network as Super Validator
item.description: Visa will help banks bring stablecoin payments and settlement on-chain while preserving privacy on the institutional blockchain network.

item.title: 🇺🇸 UPDATE: A Trump-backed proposal to allow crypto and private equity in $12T 401(k) plans has cleared White House review, with a Labor Department rule expected soon. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1ubENNQ2dLSU1sTmxNUjI2ckxvdzRkOS1ZZ0xWSzlOeGMyRHBBbnZ5XzU2WTZqQWlLZmlZZUFsUE5KUEJMLVA4N3NLR19QZU9RemlIRGRnNnoxYl93cmVQU3hFRlk?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 UPDATE: A Trump-backed pro…

item.title: SBI, Sony back Startale’s $63 million push to expand Japan’s tokenized finance stack
item.description: The Singapore-based company builds blockchain tools for financial firms and retail users, including a blockchain for tokenized securities, stablecoins, and a consumer app.

item.title: Startale raises $50M from SBI to complete $63M Series A
item.description: Startale said SBI invested $50 million to complete its Series A, with the firms working on tokenized securities, stablecoins and consumer onchain products in Japan.

item.title: Circle plunged on CLARITY Act fears, but fundamentals unchanged — Bernstein
item.description: Analysts say new US stablecoin rules may hit yield distribution, not issuers, as USDC growth in payments and trading continues to accelerate.

item.title: Solana bets on AI agents: Foundation says network is becoming core infrastructure for ‘agentic’ internet
item.description: This shift could fundamentally reshape internet business models, Solana Foundation's Vibhu Norby believes.

item.title: Sky-backed Obex spreads $1 billion across credit, energy and AI assets to expand stablecoin yield
item.description: The stablecoin incubator is targeting tokenized assets tied to AI hardware, energy and housing to move Sky’s ecosystem beyond "circular" crypto yields.

item.title: Bitcoin pinned under $72K as four network metrics show 'weaker demand'
item.description: Bitcoin price remains stuck below $72,000, as investor distribution, low whale activity, and declining network growth cast doubt on BTC's short term prospects.

item.title: Why Argentina is blocking Polymarket despite its global growth
item.description: Why Argentina is blocking Polymarket despite global growth, focusing on gambling laws, user protection concerns and regulatory pressure on prediction markets.

item.title: Tom Lee's Ethereum Treasury Firm BitMine Launches 'Made in America' Staking Network
item.description: Fundstrat co-founder Tom Lee said BitMine’s Ethereum staking platform, MAVAN, was set to become the world’s largest following its debut.

item.title: JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's spot Bitcoin ETF got an official listing announcement, and launch could be "imminent" — Bloomberg 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5hNU83T2tOOGxFYVhLQmtNb1E2SjFTN2JjTFJSeWlIb19iNW1sSHRQRFUtd0w4OHVOQ18yNUY3SWRzRU93UGRnRVpLNjRZNXJER0ZwU3JIRXVxN2NYM0taRUhUdGVtODQ?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Morgan Stanley's s…

item.title: The Protocol: Ethereum faces make-or-break moment as scaling, quantum and AI pressures mount
item.description: Plus: Solana developer platform, Balancer Labs to shut down and Bitcoin mining concentration triggers small reorg.

item.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MSBT got an official listing announcement from NYSE, that typically means launch imminent.. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9zUDFNLTVZN0p6Y2drd3I5S1Fpay1DN2wyS3p0RTZFaUZnNkZoVS1sa0RPU2psLWppSllIU2x6MjZPVVUzMTJNdGRPR18zZDUyc25ZZFR2VUloNDhHWVpZbXZDVDM?oc=5" target="_blank">Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF $MSB…

item.title: Binance tightens market maker rules, tells token issuers they must disclose partners
item.description: The guidelines ban profit-sharing and guaranteed return arrangements, aiming to prevent conflicts of interest and manipulative trading.

item.title: Circle selloff may be overdone as crypto bill weakens Coinbase edge, say analysts
item.description: The latest draft of the CLARITY Act hit both stocks, but one analyst says the bill could ultimately shift bargaining power toward Circle and away from Coinbase.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation prepares for quantum threat with new cryptography roadmap
item.description: The effort to protect Ethereum from quantum computing threats has been underway for eight years and is now producing working code.

item.title: Franklin Templeton puts its $1.7 trillion weight behind Ondo to bring 24/7 stock trading to the blockchain
item.description: The move expands access to U.S. markets as tokenized securities gain traction among digital investors.

item.title: UK Imposes Moratorium on Political Donations in Cryptocurrency
item.description: Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced an immediate freeze on crypto donations to political parties, following the independent Rycroft review.

item.title: Decentralized crowdfunding can boost artists during market downturn
item.description: Decentralized crowdfunding supports NFT artists through market crashes. Onchain purchases deliver direct capital and visibility when centralized platforms fail.

item.title: Cipher Digital Stock Pops as Firm Bolsters Shift From Bitcoin Mining With 15-Year Data Center Deal
item.description: Cipher Digital revealed a 15-year lease deal and a $200 million revolving credit facility, continuing its shift away from Bitcoin mining.

item.title: Bitpanda targets banks with Vision Chain tokenization platform
item.description: The Vienna-based crypto broker announced its Ethereum layer-2, aimed at helping European banks and fintechs issue tokenized assets under MiCA and MiFID II.

item.title: UK political crypto donations banned by Starmer government
item.description: The government halted crypto political donations over concerns about foreign interference, as the Rycroft review warns that anonymity risks undermine democratic transparency.

item.title: President Trump Names Meta, Nvidia CEOs to White House Tech and Science Council
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg, Jensen Huang, and other tech leaders will advise President Trump on emerging technology policy.

item.title: Marshall Islands basic income effort gains crypto-connected backers
item.description: Despite an IMF warning regarding the potential risks, the Marshall Islands is proceeding with a partnership which could expand its digital sovereign bond to institutional markets.

item.title: UK review recommends crypto donation pause over foreign interference risk
item.description: A UK review led by Philip Rycroft recommended a temporary moratorium on crypto political donations until stronger safeguards and statutory guidance are in place.

item.title: STS Digital launches structured crypto platform with Kraken as first partner
item.description: STS Digital said the platform offers institutional clients access to options-based strategies through predefined crypto investment products.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) gains 6% as all constituents rise
item.description: Aave (AAVE), up 5.8% from Tuesday, joined Stellar (XLM) as a top performer.

item.title: Bitcoin rebounds during Iran war, but safe haven role unproven
item.description: Bitcoin is beating gold during the Iran war, but its dependence on liquidity cycles keeps the safe haven narrative in question.

item.title: Bitcoin bounces from 50-day trend line with $72K BTC price now key focus
item.description: Bitcoin traders agreed that BTC price action needed to retake $72,000 to open up the odds of further upside as gold and US stocks gained.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs Draw in $2.5B in a Month, Close to Erasing YTD Losses
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs show "incredible fortitude" with $2.5B monthly inflows, erasing YTD losses despite a 40% price drawdown, experts say.

item.title: Cipher Digital stock rises 9% on new data center deal with Hyperscale tenant
item.description: The new 15-year hyperscale lease and $200 million in financing underscore the push into AI data centers.

item.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs swung to $167.23M in net inflows on Monday, snapping a 3-day outflow streak — only to reverse again Tuesday with $74.53M in outflows. Ethereum remains under pressure. Outflows have now stretched to 5 consecutive days, with another $ - x.com

item.title: @Strategy is hiring a Bitcoin Security Director to coordinate with the global Cyber, Crypto, and Bitcoin security community. Apply here: - x.com

item.title: Morning Minute: Circle Plunges 20% Over Clarity Act Yield Changes
item.description: Circle just had its worst day ever, while the CFTC is building a task force for crypto, AI, and prediction markets.

item.title: Midnight 🤝 Monument Bank Monument is set to become the first UK-regulated bank to tokenize retail customer deposits on a public blockchain — representing interest-bearing savings as digital tokens while remaining fully backed, redeemable in GBP, and pr - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE93NnQwbThpN3ZjMGxkSmdBRzlCVU83RG1EV2Y0Z3JrMTBlQjg1N29RYkpad1FyeVdiV0U4clRiUDZEYW5XYzVyS0xtNHBwS3ZrbnlIZzZ0X2lCbmxhYmRtZE5n?oc=5" target="_blank">Midnight 🤝 Monument Bank Monument…

item.title: Crypto Trader Calls for Boomers to Stabilize Memecoins - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE9JQXU3OG8wY2c1VUZLOUI3ck1yZ3RlZFZxR0FhTjN3Zkp4QXhGamIwX29CQkFQVmtZX19HU29SeFI2dC0wN0pTVWpYOTNHV3VQUllMeF83aw?oc=5" target="_blank">Crypto Trader Calls for Boomers to Stabilize Mem…

item.title: Monument Bank to tokenize 250 million pounds of retail deposits in UK first
item.description: The deposits will remain interest-bearing, fully backed, and protected by the country's Financial Services Compensation Scheme.
